references.text: Kostermans, AJGH. 1960. A monograph of the genus Diplodiscus Turcz. (Tiliaceae). Reinwardtia 5: 255-265

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 1 September 2023

species.citation: (Willd.) L.Laurent , Ann. Fac. Sci. Marseille 14 (1904) 150 ; Ashton, Man. Non-Dipt. Trees Sarawak 2 (1988) 428; ≡ Espera cordifolia Willd. , Neue Schriften Ges. Naturf. Freunde Berlin 3 (1801) 450. = Berrya ammonilla Roxb. , Pl. Coromandel 3 (1820) 60 ; Hort. Beng. (1814) 43, nom. inval., nom. nud.; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 22; Liu & Lo in Huang (ed.), Fl. Taiwan ed. 2, 3 (1993) 723.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Borneo, India, Indian Ocean, Indochina, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Taiwan. LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Ilocos Norte, La Union, Laguna, Zambales, MINDANAO: Davao.
species.notes: Dry, rather open secondary forests at low elevation.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 23 August 2024

species.citation: Kurz , J. Asiat. Soc. Bengal, Pt. 2, Nat. Hist. 39 (1870) 67 ; Ashton, Man. Non-Dipt. Trees Sarawak 2 (1988) 431. = Brownlowia riedelii Hemsl. , Rep. Voy. Challenger, Bot. 13 (1885) 128 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 22.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte.
species.notes: Along brackish tidal streams. Sea level.

species.citation: (L.) Kosterm. , Madj. Ilmu Pengetah. Indonesia (1959) 73 ; Ashton, Man. Non-Dipt. Trees of Sarawak 2 (1988) 435; ≡ Glabraria tersa L. , Mant. Pl. Altera (1771) 276. = Brownlowia lanceolata Benth. , J. Linn. Soc., Bot. 5(Suppl. 2) (1861) 57 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 22.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, India, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines. LUZON: Quezon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Tidal thickets and nipa swamps. Sea level.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 May 2026

species.citation: Turcz. , Bull. Soc. Imp. Naturalistes Moscou 31 (1858) 235 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 22; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 987.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BASILAN, CEBU, DINAGAT, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Batangas, Cagayan, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Isabela, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MARINDUQUE, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Agusan del Sur, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis, Misamis Occidental, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR, SIARGAO, SULU ARCHIPELAGO, TICAO.
species.notes: In Luzon from Cagayan to Sorsogon. Common in primary forests at low and medium elevation. 0m to 100m (photos).

species.citation: (Warb. ex Perkins) Burret , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 9 (1926) 619 ; Kosterm., Reinwardtia 5 (1960) 262; ≡ Brownlowia suluensis Warb. ex Perkins , Fragm. Fl. Philipp. (1904) 102 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 22; Type: Warburg 14927 (?lost), Sulu Isls, Jolo.
species.notes: Based on Warburg 14927 which, according to Merrill, is suggestive of Diplodiscus paniculatus Turcz.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 May 2018

species.citation: (Merr.) Burret , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 9 (1926) 620; ≡ Columbia subintegra Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 323 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 30; Type: FB 21861 Villamil, Mindanao: Zamboanga.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur.
